svg.text: • 104. Maximum Depth — bottom-up, return 1 + max(left, right)
• 110. Balanced Binary Tree — return height or sentinel −1
• 543. Diameter — bottom-up height plus side-effect best
• 124. Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum — gain from each subtree
• 226. Invert Binary Tree — swap left/right post-recursion
• 102. Level Order Traversal — queue with size snapshot
• 297. Serialize / Deserialize — pre-order with null markers
• 105 / 106. Construct from Preorder + Inorder / Inorder + Postorder
• 230. Kth Smallest in BST — in-order with counter
• 173. BST Iterator — controlled DFS via stack
Pick traversal order by what the answer depends on relative to the children.
